description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that tests code on every push across multiple Python versions and OS environments, then deploys to PyPI when a tag is pushed. The test job uses a matrix strategy to test on ubuntu-latest with Python 3.6, 3.7, 3.8, and 3.9, while the deploy job uses Python 3.9. Both jobs use Miniconda, install dependencies, and run tests or build and publish to PyPI.
